best_candidate.abstract: In this review, Gencel-Augusto and Lozano summarize the data on p53 mutants with a functional tetramerization domain that form mixed tetramers and in some cases have dominant-negative effects (DNE) that inactivate wild-type p53. They conclude that the DNE is mostly observed after DNA damage but fails in other contexts.
